title: Here Comes the Sun
why_this_song: Here Comes the Sun by The Beatles (1969) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Little darlin', it's been a long, cold, lonely winter
Little darlin', it feels like years since it's been here
Sun, sun, sun, here it comes
Sun, sun, sun, here it comes
Sun, sun, sun, here it comes
Sun, sun, sun, here it comes

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "comes" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "comes" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "it's" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "it's" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Sun, sun, sun, here it comes

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Here Comes the Sun" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Here Comes the Sun" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Here Comes the Sun", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Here Comes the Sun", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Here Comes the Sun" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Here Comes the Sun" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Here Comes the Sun" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Here Comes the Sun"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: "Here Comes the Sun" was released in 1969. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Here Comes the Sun" foi lançada em 1969. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask The Beatles one question about "Here Comes the Sun", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para The Beatles sobre "Here Comes the Sun", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Here Comes the Sun" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Here Comes the Sun" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Here Comes the Sun" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Here Comes the Sun" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Here Comes the Sun" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Here Comes the Sun", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
